name: Sororitas Monastery | Warhammer 40k
description:
~PRAISE HIM!~

The Adepta Sororitas relentlessly fight against the vile xenos and heretics to please the God-Emperor of Mankind but often times a Sister of Battle will experience battle shock and weariness. That’s when Sisters of Battle retreat to Monasteries like this one…

Good Luck! Try to not be servitorized!

(THIS TOOK FOREVER! I included most orders from the Adepta Sororitas except for the ones that didn’t make sense, example: Ebon Chalice, Repentia, Famulous, Pronatus.) Also included stuff like the rankings within the orders just in case. Maybe I went too in-depth…
creator: MostlyHollowed..
